hooks.command: input=$(cat); prompt=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.user_prompt // empty'); jq -cn --arg prompt "$prompt" '{event:"prompt",prompt:$prompt}' >> ~/.claude/skills/skill-audit-usage.jsonl

input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); jq -cn --arg command "$cmd" '{event:"pre_tool",tool:"Bash",command:$command}' >> ~/.claude/skills/skill-audit-usage.jsonl
